name: One Dish Chicken and Rice Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart shallow baking dish, mix the soup, water, rice, paprika, and pepper.
2. Place the chicken on top of the rice mixture. Sprinkle with additional paprika and pepper.
3. Cover. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes or until done.
Makes: 4 servings
